assignment.title: Experiment 2 - Lifting Latent Fingerprints Using Lifting Powders
assignment.instructor_text:
Using fingerprint liftng powder and lifting fingerprints is a skill required practice. When forensic investigators are learning this skill, 'mock' lifting powders ae often used to prevent the waste of expensive 'real' lifting powders. In this experiment, you will be attempting to enhance and lift latent fingerprints using some fairly common household items.

Please download and complete Experiment 2 - Lifting Latent Fingerprints
